findings_summary: source_refs is required by protocol/prompt but not schema-validated end-to-end
Adopted consensus field names diverge across commander outputs
Ledger readers tolerate malformed inputs but silently lose observability
Monitor count fidelity issues (event-name drift, telemetry/filesystem mismatches)
Test and docs coverage gaps for collab schema, propagation, and monitor semantics
recommended_next_actions: Canonicalize adopted_consensus_item_ids and source_refs in commander bundle schema
Add JSONL/schema validation checks for collab ledgers and result bundles
Harden monitor/teardown parsing with explicit parse-failure counters
Add smoke/regression tests for malformed ledgers and count reconciliation
Document collab protocol fields and monitor-count source-of-truth rules
